[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001 3
1 1001010 3
2 0111101 5
3 1100011 4
4 0010100 2
5 0101101 4
6 0101110 4
7 0010000 1

12 21 0111101 5 match 2
23 32 0101111 5
34 43 0111110 5
45 54 1010001 3 match 0
56 65 1011011 5
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1101111 6
13 31 0111110 5
24 42 0111101 5 match 2
35 53 1111111 a

60 06 1101011 5
71 17 0111101 5 match 2

14 41 0010100 2 match 4

47 74 0111101 5 match 2
50 05 1110011 5
61 16 1011110 5
72 27 0111101 5 match 2
